title: Corazon Hides Law
description: Pages 14–18 focus on corazon hides law, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as corazon and Law are trapped between Marines, pirates, and Doflamingo while the Ope Ope no Mi becomes the center of the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How much do you think we can sell a fruit like this for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's ridiculous! Has the gov- ernment lost its mind or something!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: With that much money in our hands, we won't even need to continue pirating!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If you just think about it for a minute... If a doctor ate this,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They'd be able to become renowned the world over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In the past, there was a legendary doctor that ate this...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: He became famous for his ability to perform miracle operations that could cure any and all illnesses... but, as for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I can make it so that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: How was that!? Didn't make a sound, did it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: What's even the point of that power!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: It isn't even cool! Baby S's Buki Buki is way better!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Damn it! I'll admit, that one is pretty badass...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But, when it comes to a good night's sleep...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: There ain't any- one that can beat me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Captain! W- without a single sound,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: The flames have reached the treasure warehouse!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Put out the flames! What the fuck is going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Have we been invaded or something!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Glass is raining down! Were they broken or some- thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: some- one, turn on the light-!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Now we'll be able to cure your illness!

summary: Corazon Hides Law advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
